Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"=== PRE-FLIGHT: current state must be HEALTHY ===\\"; ifconfig pppoe0 | grep inet | head -1; ifconfig vtnet0 | grep inet | head -1; pgrep -lf mpd5 | head -1; pgrep -lf unbound | head -1; netstat -rn -f inet | grep default; echo; echo \\"=== current LAN+WAN <if> values ===\\"; awk \\"/<lan>/,/<\\\\/lan>/\\" /conf/config.xml | grep \\"<if>\\"; awk \\"/<wan>/,/<\\\\/wan>/\\" /conf/config.xml | grep \\"<if>\\"; echo; echo \\"=== fresh backup of working config ===\\"; cp -v /conf/config.xml /conf/config.xml.working-pre-e1000-$\(date +%H%M%S\); echo; echo \\"=== edit ONLY LAN if to em0 ===\\"; sed -i .bak \\"/<lan>/,/<\\\\/lan>/ s|<if>vtnet0</if>|<if>em0</if>|\\" /conf/config.xml; echo; echo \\"=== verify edit ===\\"; awk \\"/<lan>/,/<\\\\/lan>/\\" /conf/config.xml | grep \\"<if>\\"; awk \\"/<wan>/,/<\\\\/wan>/\\" /conf/config.xml | grep \\"<if>\\"; grep -c vtnet0 /conf/config.xml; echo \\"\(should be 0\)\\"'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"=== interfaces ===\\"; ifconfig -l; echo; ifconfig em0 2>&1 | head -5; echo; ifconfig pppoe0 2>&1 | head -3; echo; echo \\"=== routes ===\\"; netstat -rn -f inet | head -8; echo; echo \\"=== ping internet ===\\"; ping -c 2 -t 2 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | tail -3; echo; echo \\"=== zenarmor and netmap ===\\"; pgrep -lf eastpect | head -1; ifconfig em0 | grep -i netmap'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"--- ifconfig em0 ---\\"; ifconfig em0 | grep -E \\"inet |description\\" | head -3; echo \\"--- ifconfig igc0 ---\\"; ifconfig igc0 | grep -E \\"inet |description\\" | head -3; echo \\"--- pppoe0 ---\\"; ifconfig pppoe0 2>&1 | head -3; echo \\"--- mpd5 ---\\"; pgrep -lf mpd5 | head -1; echo \\"--- ping inet ---\\"; ping -c 2 -t 2 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | tail -3'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"--- pppoe0 ---\\"; ifconfig pppoe0 2>&1 | grep -E \\"inet |flags\\" | head -3; echo \\"--- default route ---\\"; netstat -rn -f inet | grep default; echo \\"--- ping internet from opnsense ---\\"; ping -c 2 -t 2 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | tail -3; echo \\"--- NAT rules active ---\\"; pfctl -s nat 2>&1 | head -10; echo \\"--- pf running ---\\"; pfctl -s info 2>&1 | head -5'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"=== reload pf rules from config ===\\"; configctl filter reload 2>&1 | head -5; sleep 2; echo; echo \\"=== NAT rules now? ===\\"; pfctl -s nat 2>&1; echo; echo \\"=== test ping from opnsense \(should still work\) ===\\"; ping -c 2 -t 2 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | tail -3'")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/sites_ad_p3_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@192.168.0.1 "/bin/sh -c 'echo \\"=== backup ===\\"; cp -v /conf/config.xml /conf/config.xml.before-wan-fix-$\(date +%H%M%S\); echo; echo \\"=== fix WAN: igc0 -> pppoe0, dhcp -> ppp ===\\"; sed -i .bak4 \\"/<wan>/,/<\\\\/wan>/{s|<if>igc0</if>|<if>pppoe0</if>|; s|<ipaddr>dhcp</ipaddr>|<ipaddr>ppp</ipaddr>|; s|<ipaddrv6>dhcp6</ipaddrv6>|<ipaddrv6></ipaddrv6>|;}\\" /conf/config.xml; echo; echo \\"=== verify ===\\"; awk \\"/<wan>/,/<\\\\/wan>/\\" /conf/config.xml; echo; echo \\"=== reload filter ===\\"; configctl filter reload 2>&1; sleep 2; echo; echo \\"=== NAT rules now? ===\\"; pfctl -s nat 2>&1'")
